allow: PowerShell(npm run build 2>&1 | Out-String; Write-Output "=== BUILD EXIT: $LASTEXITCODE ===")
PowerShell(npm run lint 2>&1 | Out-String; Write-Output "=== LINT EXIT: $LASTEXITCODE ==="; npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | Out-String; Write-Output "=== TSC EXIT: $LASTEXITCODE ===")
PowerShell(npm run lint 2>&1 | Out-String; Write-Output "=== LINT EXIT: $LASTEXITCODE ===")

PowerShell(npm install @supabase/supabase-js @supabase/ssr --silent 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 3; Write-Output "supabase-js: $\(\(Get-Content node_modules/@supabase/supabase-js/package.json | ConvertFrom-Json\).version\)  ssr: $\(\(Get-Content node_modules/@supabase/ssr/package.json | ConvertFrom-Json\).version\)")
PowerShell(npm install server-only --silent 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 3; Write-Output "server-only: $\(\(Get-Content node_modules/server-only/package.json | ConvertFrom-Json\).version\)")

PowerShell(npm run lint 2>&1 | Out-String; Write-Output "=== LINT EXIT: $LASTEXITCODE ==="; npm run build 2>&1 | Out-String | Select-String -Pattern "Compiled successfully|error|Error|warning"; Write-Output "=== BUILD EXIT: $LASTEXITCODE ===")
